sql_array: CREATE TABLE timestamps_table (id INTEGER, ts1 TIMESTAMP, ts2 TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO timestamps_table (id, ts1, ts2) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '1992-09-20 20:38:48', TIMESTAMP '1992-03-22 01:02:03.1234');
INSERT INTO timestamps_table (id, ts1, ts2) VALUES (2, TIMESTAMP '2020-01-01 12:00:00', TIMESTAMP '2019-12-31 23:59:59');
SELECT id, least(ts1, ts2) AS earliest_timestamp FROM timestamps_table;
UPDATE timestamps_table SET ts1 = least(ts1, TIMESTAMP '2022-01-01 10:10:10') WHERE id = 1;
